в”—в”ҒвңҰвқҳај»ајәвқҳвңҰв”Ғв”ӣ

From the skies appeared a Dragon with noble, golden scales as radiant as the sun. Upon the island's tallest peak did the Dragon decide to perch. All denizens of the island looked up in awe and presented various fruits as offerings. The island was home to blooming vibrant flowers and breathtaking waterfalls: a true paradise.
